codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original failing feature `mini-spotify-dark-navigation-shell` and the follow-up fix `mini-account-secondary-roundtrip-fallback`. The original bug in `mini/lib/shell-navigation.js` was real: `returnToAccountSurface()` always used `navigateBack`, so Account leaf pages could strand the user when opened as the current stack root or restored entrypoint. The fix now inspects the current page stack, falls back through primary-surface navigation when the stack depth is 1, and adds a `navigateBack` fail handler that routes back to `/pages/account/index` if runtime back navigation is unavailable. Updated regressions in `mini/tests/publish-shell-navigation.test.mjs` cover both stack-root fallback and runtime `navigateBack` failure, and `mini/lib/account-secondary-page.js` continues to route the secondary-page back actions through the repaired helper.

summary: Pass. The prior blocking Account round-trip issue is resolved: Settings/About/Privacy/Help now return to Account via normal back navigation when available and fall back to Account when the leaf page is the stack root or a restored entrypoint. No remaining blocking correctness issues were found in the scoped navigation fix.
